mapper.insert: insert into documents (document_id, company_id, document_category_id, title, description, visibility, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, content_kind, draft_json, published_json, published_at, published_by) values (#{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visibility,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contentKind,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{draftJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{publishedJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{publishedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update documents set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, document_category_id = #{documentCategoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visibility = #{visibility,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content_kind = #{contentKind,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, draft_json = #{draftJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, published_json = #{publishedJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, published_at = #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, published_by = #{publishedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select document_id, company_id, document_category_id, title, description, visibility, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, content_kind, draft_json, published_json, published_at, published_by from documents where document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select document_id, company_id, document_category_id, title, description, visibility, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, content_kind, draft_json, published_json, published_at, published_by from documents

select document_id, company_id, document_category_id, title, description, visibility, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, content_kind, draft_json, published_json, published_at, published_by from documents where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(trim(coalesce(status, ''))) <> 'DELETED' order by created_at desc
select count(1) from documents where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(trim(coalesce(status, ''))) <> 'DELETED'
